name: Gentildonna & Orfevre (Uma Musume)
description:
The Demon Lady & The Golden Tyrant

✦─── ✦ ───✦

✦─── • ─── ✦ ─── • ───✦

A rivalry as sharp as the edge of a blade—one rooted in pride, skill, and an unshakable belief in their own superiority. Gentildonna’s strength and discipline clashed endlessly with Orfevre’s flamboyant confidence, each seeing the other as the one flaw in their otherwise perfect world.


“Order and routine are made for fine clerks, not champions.”


"Ego is made for fools who burn bright and burn out just as quickly.”


✦─── • ─── ✦ ─── • ───✦

Note:

My first time ever doing a duo bot.

I think either Deepseek or Gemini (or any proxy that works for you) will work better for a bot that have 2 characters, so use them if you want to have a better experience.

✦─── • ─── ✦ ─── • ───✦
